hero.description: Connect with certified facilitators who can guide you through The Four Questions to question stressful thoughts and find clarity.
facilitators.title: Facilitators
facilitators.subtitle: Find the right facilitator for you.
facilitator.booking.title: Book a Session
facilitator.booking.subtitle: Check availability and schedule your time.
facilitator.preview.title: Profile Preview
facilitator.preview.description: This is how your profile appears to clients. Booking is only available for client accounts.
chat.select_conversation: Select a conversation to start messaging
chat.ai_disclaimer: Copilot suggestions are based on 'The Work' of Byron Katie. Copilot can make mistakes. Review before sending.
bookings.manage_description: View your schedule, manage sessions, and handle booking requests.
bookings.sessions_description: View and manage your upcoming and past sessions.
bookings.no_active_sessions_description: You don't have any active sessions right now. Sessions will appear here when scheduled.
bookings.availability_description: Set your weekly availability and date-specific overrides.
bookings.date_overrides_description: Block specific time slots on specific dates.
bookings.click_slot_exception: Click slots to mark as unavailable.
bookings.no_slots_unavailable: No available slots on this day.
bookings.select_date_to_view: Select a date to view and override time slots.
bookings.cancel_session_description: This action cannot be undone. The session will be cancelled and the client will be notified.
footer.tagline:
A platform dedicated to peace of mind through inquiry.
Connect, question, and find freedom.
footer.disclaimer: This service does not replace professional medical diagnosis or treatment. If you are experiencing a serious mental health crisis, please contact emergency services or a licensed mental health professional immediately.
